name: Tunnel of Fudge Cake - Scratch
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and granulated sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add powdered sugar, blending well.
4. By hand, stir in flour, cocoa, and walnuts until well blended.
5. Spoon batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 58-62 minutes.
7. Cool upright in the pan on a cooling rack for one hour.
8. Invert onto a plate.
9. Cool completely.
10. Pour glaze over top of cake, allowing some to run down the sides.
Glaze:
3/4 cup powdered sugar
1 1/2 cups milk
1/4 cup cocoa powder
